name: apineer
description: APIneer — a locally running API platform for building, testing, and managing API requests

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,green "cd src/api/APIneer.Api && dotnet run" "cd src/ui && pnpm dev"
scripts.build: concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,green "cd src/api/APIneer.Api && dotnet build" "cd src/ui && pnpm build"
scripts.test: concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,green "dotnet test" "cd src/ui && pnpm test"
